title: Amazon RDS DB Instance
description: Represents an Amazon RDS database instance with its associated configuration, state, endpoint, and metadata.

dBInstanceIdentifier.description: The user-supplied unique key that identifies the DB instance

dBInstanceClass.description: The name of the compute and memory capacity class of the DB instance (e.g., db.m5.large, db.r5.xlarge)

engine.description: The database engine for this DB instance

engineVersion.description: The version number of the database engine

dBInstanceStatus.description: The current state of the DB instance

masterUsername.description: The master username for the DB instance

dBName.description: The name of the initial database created when the DB instance was created

allocatedStorage.description: The allocated storage size in gibibytes (GiB)

instanceCreateTime.description: The date and time the DB instance was created

preferredBackupWindow.description: The daily time range during which automated backups are created

backupRetentionPeriod.description: The number of days for which automatic DB snapshots are retained

vpcSecurityGroups.description: The VPC security groups associated with the DB instance

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone where the DB instance is located

multiAZ.description: Whether the DB instance is a Multi-AZ deployment

autoMinorVersionUpgrade.description: Whether minor version patches are applied automatically

storageType.description: The storage type associated with the DB instance

storageEncrypted.description: Whether the DB instance is encrypted

publiclyAccessible.description: Whether the DB instance is publicly accessible

cACertificateIdentifier.description: The identifier of the CA certificate for this DB instance

dBInstanceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB instance

tags.description: Tags assigned to the DB instance

port.description: The port that the DB instance listens on

dBClusterIdentifier.description: If the DB instance is a member of a DB cluster, the cluster identifier

licenseModel.description: The license model information for this DB instance

Endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the DB instance

address.description: The DNS address of the DB instance

port.description: The port that the DB instance listens on

hostedZoneId.description: The ID of the hosted zone associated with the DB instance

DBSubnetGroup.description: Information about the subnet group associated with the DB instance

dBSubnetGroupName.description: The name of the DB subnet group

dBSubnetGroupDescription.description: The description of the DB subnet group

vpcId.description: The VPC ID of the DB subnet group

subnetGroupStatus.description: The status of the DB subnet group

subnets.description: The subnets that belong to the DB subnet group

name.description: The name of the Availability Zone

VpcSecurityGroupMembership.description: Describes a VPC security group membership

vpcSecurityGroupId.description: The ID of the VPC security group

status.description: The membership status of the VPC security group
